sub_modules.fir_coeff_rom_101: Pure-combinational hard-coded 101-tap coefficient provider with the exact signed integer coefficients required by the benchmark.
sub_modules.fir_sample_formatter: Pure-combinational formatter that builds the current FIR sample vector from the new serial input sample and the registered delay line.
sub_modules.fir_symmetric_preadder: Pure-combinational linear-phase FIR pre-adder that sums mirrored samples and extracts the center tap sample.
sub_modules.fir_symmetric_mac: Pure-combinational symmetric multiply-accumulate engine using mirrored pair sums, center sample, and hard-coded coefficients, accumulating into 64 bits.
sub_modules.fir_output_scaler: Pure-combinational fixed-point output scaler that arithmetic-right-shifts the 64-bit accumulator by 20 and returns the 24-bit output word.
